description:
This quiz tests practical skills in context window management, token budgeting, retrieval strategies, and prompt structuring for production AI systems. It begins with accessible concepts but quickly escalates to intermediate and advanced difficulty, challenging test-takers to navigate real-world failure modes. The tone is pragmatic and no-nonsense, prioritizing engineering reality over theoretical hype.
Topics: Context windows, Token budgets, Retrieval systems, Prompt structure, AI failure modes, Prompt caching, Hybrid search
Audience: AI engineers and developers building production-grade LLM applications
